'''Shella Motti''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and a member of the [[Motti family]]. At some point following the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], she was abducted by agents of the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]]. Despite the efforts of [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]], her uncle by [[Marriage/Legends|marriage]], to rescue her, Motti refused to return to her family.

==Biography==
Shella Motti was part of the [[Motti family]], an influental [[Human/Legends|Human]] clan centralized on [[Phelarion/Legends|Phelarion]], in the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. She was a cousin of then-Commander [[Conan Antonio Motti/Legends|Conan Antonio Motti]], and the niece of [[Thalassa Tarkin]], nee Motti, who had [[Marriage/Legends|married]] the governor [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]. At an unknown point during the early [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]], Motti was kidnapped by agents of a criminal organization known as the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]], and Tarkin hired several beings to rescue her. Though the Nebula Front's hideout was located and Shella found, she surprised her would-be rescuers by refusing to return to her family. Worse, she had already hired a second team of agents to prevent her return, led by a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] that Tarkin's hired men had already crossed paths with.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' does not say if Shella Motti was ever returned to her family.
